title: Where to Purchase Cysic (CYS): Full Guide
content:
Cysic has emerged as a significant player in the infrastructure sector, drawing attention from various venture capital firms for its ability to monetize idle hardware. ## Why Buy Cysic? Cysic is at the forefront of the ZK-compute narrative. Unlike general-purpose platforms like Internet Computer, Cysic specializes in high-efficiency hardware aggregation. This specialization, combined with a strong narrative strength score of 95, makes it a focus for those tracking infrastructure development.

## Top Exchange Options To acquire CYS, you should seek out centralized or decentralized exchanges that support the token. Always verify the ticker symbol and network compatibility before proceeding with any transactions. Ensure you are using a reputable platform that offers sufficient liquidity for your intended order size.

## Purchase Tutorial 1. Choose a reputable exchange. 2. Complete your identity verification (KYC) if required. 3. Deposit fiat currency or transfer cryptocurrency to your wallet on the platform. 4. Navigate to the CYS/USDT or appropriate trading pair. 5. Execute your order using a market or limit order type. 6. Once the order is filled, move your tokens to a secure wallet.

## Securing Your Tokens Storing tokens on an exchange introduces custodial risk. For larger quantities, a hardware wallet is recommended to maintain self-custody. Always ensure your seed phrase is stored offline and never shared with unauthorized parties.

## Important Risks The TokenRadar risk score for Cysic is 5, classifying it as medium risk. Potential buyers must consider the volatility index of 97, which indicates that price fluctuations can be frequent. Additionally, always review the tokenomics, as the difference between circulating supply and total supply can influence long-term value.

## FAQ
- Is it safe to store CYS on an exchange? Exchanges are convenient but expose you to custodial risk; hardware wallets are preferred.
- What is the risk score? The current risk score is 5, categorized as medium.
- Can I buy CYS with fiat? Depending on the exchange, you may be able to purchase directly with fiat currency.
- How can I track my investment? Use tokenradar.co to track price updates in real-time.
